payload.note: The individual onboarding alert for Tareck Joseph resulted in an investigate_next_step decision due to conflicting dates of birth and geographies between the screened party (US, DOB 1990-05-11) and the matched party (Venezuela, DOB 1974-11-12). Although there is strong entity type support for both individuals, the contradictions necessitate an analyst review to ascertain the true identity before closure.
evidence_summary: Date of birth conflict between screened party and matched party.
Geography conflict as the screened party is associated with US while the matched party is linked to Venezuela (VE).
Entity type supports individual status for both parties.
High match strength score indicates a strong potential match despite contradictions.
missing_information_summary: Lack of additional corroboration such as matching identifiers or geographical details.
Missing date corroboration to resolve DOB discrepancy.

payload.next_step_rationale: Resolve contradictions by investigating and gathering additional corroboration.
